summary: M.S. in Artificial Intelligence from Illinois Institute of Technology with production experience deploying ML models on Kubernetes and building AI-powered systems end to end. Containerized and deployed a YOLO-based computer vision pipeline on Kubernetes for scalable inference, and shipped a production RAG developer tool using LangChain, Docker, and GitHub Actions CI/CD. Familiar with PyTorch and deep learning fundamentals, comfortable working in Linux environments, and experienced integrating AI models into backend production pipelines.

skills.languages: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, SQL, Go, Java (familiar), C++ (familiar)
skills.ml: PyTorch, TensorFlow, ONNX, Computer Vision, Object Detection, YOLO, Deep Learning, LangChain, LangGraph, LLMs, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), HuggingFace Transformers, NLP, Vector Embeddings
skills.infra: Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), Helm, AWS, GCP, FastAPI, RESTful APIs, PostgreSQL, Pinecone, Supabase, Railway, Vercel, Git, Linux
